  sl  local_address rem_address   st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 0100007F:ABCD 0201010A:0801 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 12345 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   1: 0100007F:ABCE 0201010A:0801 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 12346 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
